skip_reason: The bookmarklet requires a specific Google Maps 'contrib' review page where it can find span.rsqaWe (the review timestamp anchor) and an open review with a contributor ID + place ID + review ID embedded in APP_INITIALIZATION_STATE or reachable via the timeline _rpc/pc API. Google Maps review pages render dynamically, often require scrolling/expanding a review, and the exact DOM/class names are brittle and frequently change. This cannot be reliably reproduced headless in CI.
notes: Passive - on a Google Maps review page, finds span.rsqaWe and inserts a 'Review Timestamps' box showing the created/modified ISO dates extracted from APP_INITIALIZATION_STATE (falling back to an internal Maps timeline RPC call). target_url is a best-guess public contributor reviews page; exact review presence/structure may vary and Google Maps frequently changes its internal class names (rsqaWe) and JS variable layout.

checks.comment: Timestamp box title should appear when run on a valid review page
